sections.title: Why this MVP exists
sections.body:
Marketing pages live next to code.
Editors can reorder and update sections without storing JSX trees.

sections.title: Keep rendering and editing decoupled
sections.body: The page renderer only understands schema. The editor adds drag handles and inspector state around it.

items.title: Schema-first storage
items.description: Pages are committed as JSON files in the repository.

items.title: Section drag-and-drop
items.description: Editors can reorder sections with a focused DnD flow.

items.title: Shared renderer
items.description: Runtime and editor preview render the same section components.

sections.headline: Ship repository-backed landing pages
sections.subheadline: This page is rendered from JSON in src/content/pages and edited with a shared schema-driven UI.

sections.title: Update the JSON and save
sections.body: The save API validates the schema and writes it back into the repository.
